intro: Every prospective order traverses a layered gate stack before it can reach Alpaca. Compliance and data-quality gates fail closed; intel and risk gates degrade gracefully. The whole stack is summarised below in execution order.

stack.name: Restricted-list (W2b)
stack.what: Reject if symbol is on strategy/restricted_list.yaml.

stack.name: Approved venue
stack.what: Only Alpaca paper URL is accepted.

stack.name: Idempotency
stack.file: orchestrator.py — existing position / pending order / already-traded-today
stack.what: Block re-entry the same trading day; block when there is an open order or open position.

stack.name: Data-quality (W2a)
stack.what: Bar age within thresholds (RTH 48 h, overnight 96 h, crypto 2–6 h, intraday 0.25–1 h); required OHLC columns present; NaN ratio ≤ 5%.

stack.name: News-sentiment floor
stack.what: Equities only — daily aggregate sentiment must clear the floor; crypto bypasses (Polygon news is equity-focused).

stack.name: Stock earnings
stack.what: Block if earnings within lookahead_days = 5 (Finnhub).

stack.name: Stock insider cluster
stack.what: Block at ≥ 5 insider sells in trailing 90 days (Finnhub).

stack.name: Macro shock
stack.what: Aggregated GDELT sentiment ≤ −3.0 blocks all entries.

stack.name: Crypto F&G
stack.what: Crypto only — block outside [floor 20, ceiling 80].

stack.name: Crypto Reddit spike
stack.what: Crypto only — block if mentions ≥ 2× 24h-prior.

stack.name: Crypto CoinGecko
stack.what: Crypto only — block if sentiment_votes_up_percentage < 50.

stack.name: Per-trade risk %
stack.what: Notional × stop-distance ≤ per_trade_risk_pct × equity.

stack.name: Max position %
stack.what: Notional ≤ max_position_pct × equity.

stack.name: Concentration
stack.what: Per-symbol notional ≤ max_symbol_concentration_pct.

stack.name: Asset-class regime cap
stack.what: Stocks/crypto/options caps conditioned on the live regime.

stack.name: Gross / net exposure
stack.what: Gross ≤ 200 % of equity; |net| ≤ 100 % of equity.

stack.name: Daily / weekly P&L
stack.what: Trip when daily_pnl_pct ≤ −daily_loss_limit_pct or weekly equivalent.

stack.name: Per-strategy halt
stack.what: Skip orders whose strategy_name is in the halted set; other lanes continue.

stack.name: VaR after-trade
stack.what: Historical VaR α=0.05, additive (no correlation credit) — must remain within configured cap.

stack.name: Options collateral
stack.what: Wheel-only — caps aggregate options collateral and per-symbol concentration.

stack.name: Sector cap
stack.what: Wheel-only — equity + pending option collateral ≤ sector_cap_pct (default 25 %).

stack.name: LLM cost halt
stack.what: AnthropicClient refuses to call the model when monthly spend ≥ 100 %.

var.intro: VaR is the conservative tail used in pre-trade and post-trade risk reporting. The implementation is deliberately additive — no correlation credit — so the limit always overestimates risk rather than understates it.
rows: Magnitude of the bottom-α empirical quantile loss; 95 % default.
Mean of the worst α tail (CVaR). Reported alongside VaR.
Adds the candidate's marginal VaR to the portfolio total — no correlation netting.
